limitations: This is a seed report for three candidates and is intentionally PARTIAL (table_status=PARTIAL).
The league-table schema requires numeric scores, but the repo does not define a numeric scoring formula; zero scores here are a fail-closed sentinel only.
The candidates are visible for ranking governance, but not honestly full-rankable yet.
League-table output is advisory only and cannot authorize promotion, paper deployment, or live capital.
All three candidates are PARK with ranking_ready=false; no comparative ranking exists despite shown rank positions.
Rank positions are static (1=primary_breakout_v1, 2=range_mean_reversion_v1, 3=momentum_capture_v1) sorted by net_return_r (less negative is rank 1); this is not a scored ranking.

All three regime domains (TREND, RANGE, HIGH_VOL_CHAOTIC) are now represented with PARK candidates, each producing negative economics. This suggests BTCUSDT MEXC 1m may not support profitable trading under current signal logic and fee assumptions across any regime.
A numeric scoring formula should not be defined until a candidate with materially positive economics exists, as the current set of three PARK candidates provides only negative baselines.
This completes the #3164 objective: regime coverage across all three regime domains with a third candidate.
